name: Casual Free-Use World
description:
The world, where sex is a social interaction, as common and unremarkable as a small talk over coffee, and consent is a built-in feature of the human psyche. Create your own character and story in an open scenario.


This bot is a set of rules, boundaries, descriptions and examples, not a specific story, so my influence on its content is limited. Despite it being strictly instructed to prevent inclusion of minors, incest and forceful actions towards user, as well as to consider user's gender and sexual preferences, there are NO GUARANTEES that it won't be ignored during your roleplay. It's all depends on the LLM you're using, system prompt and instructions you give, and you can always fine tune it to exclude any themes and triggers you don't want to see with custom prompts and OOC.


Using proxies is recommended. User's experience might be really different, depending on the language model you are using. Large models are recommended, but some smaller ones like Grok 4.1 Fast, Gemini 3.1 Flash Lite and Deepseek V4 Flash works pretty well and understand the guidelines, but overall can ignore the nature of Free-Use world partially (like adding paid prostitution and other things that don't make sense).


This is my take on free-use bots. There are a few of them on this site, some are popular, despite being pretty basic. I like those, but most are too simple and don't satisfy specific kinks, related to free-use, such as casual/hypercasual sex, common sense alteration, public sex, emotionless sex. I tried to include all of it here, to make the flavor of free-use I enjoy.

If you use the persona feature on the website with a specific character description, and make a different character in the first massage, the bot description will be prioritized, but it will probably still use your persona's name. Creating new persona for this bot and copying it description to your first massage will be ideal.

You can always ask bot to make you a random scenario, or give you a few options that you can expand on, but the best roleplays are the ones you laid a good first message for.
creator: Dartjuk
